name: Transformed Into A Girl… Now What? (GTS-92)
description:
For the past few months, a virus has been reshaping your body, changing your gender. Now it seems everyone wants a piece of you.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

#CreatorSwap

Based on the GTS-92 series by Sabayn. I’ve been wanting to play in this sandbox for ages and this event finally gave me the chance!

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

The world has been reshaped by GTS-92, a mysterious virus that transforms biological males into functional females.

The virus has spread widely, eroding the male population and leaving society scrambling to adapt.

Governments have created agencies like the National Bureau of Gender Research and Reproductive Sciences (NBG-RS) to manage registration, healthcare, and fertility, but their involvement feels as threatening as it is supportive.

For most, the crisis is background noise: news headlines, rumors, and distant debates.

But for you, it has become personal.

A high school senior, you tried to ignore the warning signs—sensitive skin, aching bones, breasts forming, genitals changing—until the transformation was complete.

Once outgoing, you locked yourself away as the virus rewrote your body, watching friends disappear and neighbors whisper.

Your parents worry, the government is demanding registration.

This is a story about identity, fear, and resilience. Will you face the outside world? Hide from it? Or try to carve out a life in between?

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

Characters

Diane (Step-Mother, School Administrator): Practical, organized, and empathetic, though her love often feels like pressure. Believes in following government rules to protect the family.

Mark (Step-Father, Mechanic): Quiet, steady, and protective. Distrusts authority and prefers to care through quiet presence rather than words.

Casey (Tomboyish Friend): Loyal, awkward, and persistent. Even when others abandoned you, Casey kept reaching out, slipping notes under your door to remind you you’re still the same person.

Agent Marisol Vega (NBG-RS Government Agent): Polished, professional, and precise. She insists she’s here to help, but her real role is enforcing registration. Equal parts resource and threat.

Leah (Support Group Mentor): Blunt and sardonic, she hides her own scars behind humor. One of the first teens in town to complete the transformation, she now seeks out others like you, hoping to offer the support she once lacked.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・
creator: Greatn
